item.title: Iran live updates: Ground troops 'not part of the plan,' Leavitt says
item.description: IDF airstrikes targeted "dozens" of sites connected to internal security forces.

item.title: US sub sinks Iranian ship by torpedo in Indian Ocean, 1st such attack since WWII
item.description: A U.S. submarine used a torpedo to sink and Iranian ship in the Indian Ocean Tuesday, the first such attack since WWII , the Pentagon said.

item.title: LIVE: ABC News Live
item.description: 24/7 coverage of breaking news and live events

item.title: WATCH: Celebrating Holi, the Festival of Colors
item.description: ABC News' Ashan Singh tells us all about the Hindu holiday celebrating rebirth, renewal and the triumph of good over evil.

item.title: WATCH: US sub sinks Iranian ship by torpedo in Indian Ocean, 1st such attack since WWII
item.description: A U.S. submarine used a torpedo to sink and Iranian ship in the Indian Ocean Tuesday, the first such attack since WWII , the Pentagon said.
